我唔係好識寫pseudo code 但我試下大約寫個algorothm 點run


array = input ()


for i in range(x)
if array[i][0] == 'I'
   insert[] = array[i][1]
else :
     extract = array [i][1]

n= len(extract)

def judgequeue()
      for i in range(n)
           if insert[i] != extract[i]
                return false
      return true

def judgestack ()

     for i in range (x) :
           if array [i][0] == 'i'
               stack.append(array [i][0])
           else: 
                 if stack.pop() != array [i][1]
                       return false
      return true


def judgeminimum
   for i in range (x) :
           if array [i][0] == 'i'
               stack.append(array [i][0])
           else: 
                  x = min(stack)
                 if x != array[i][1]
                       return false
   return true


個array[i][0/1]
個i 係第幾個input from computer 而0就係either insert/extract 1就係個數值

如果true 就print yes false 就print no



唔知道有無幫到巴打你用手機易睇d

replies.msg:
Not really, I graduated in one of 三大 and people here seem to think that graduates from my school's CS department write English better than code.

If this is an assignment, you need to ask your prof or TA whether you are expected to implement some data structures yourself or you can use python's library. Someone pointed out heapq already above. Go read python's documentation on heapq. If you are expected to implement some of the required data structures, read about min-heap. If I remember correctly, there is a very cool O(n) heapifying algorithm.

你整三個variables分別係queue, stack同heapq，iterate個input，insert嘅時候就insert曬入去三個，extract時就三個都pop一下，睇下邊個唔match個input value就排除咗個可能性，直到得返一個可能性

利申鳩噏

我都係諗整三個variable,我當分別叫a,b,c
check queue:a記住sequeue第一個insert既數
check stack:b記住最新insert既數
check smallest-first-queue:c記住最少insert既數
如果第一個extract既數等於a,b,c其中一個,就係對應既data structure
咁樣應該最快,因為read個sequence時已經可以check埋,

replies.msg:
唔係叫你淨係check第一個，係一直check直到剩低一個可能性
除非佢咁玩嘢成條n size array有n-1個都係同時滿足三個可能性，否則根本唔會讀曬成條已經有答案
仲有係Python loop超級慢，就算你loop入面無嘢都一樣，將所有checking擺係同一個loop入面會快好多，況且你仲有一個loop係O(n^2)，你試下我個方法，應該快好多

replies.msg:
q = []
s = []
h = []
for command, value in input_list:
    if command == insert:
        q.append(value)
        s.append(value)
        h.append(value)
    else:
        if value != q[0]: => not queue
        else q.pop(0)
        if value != s[-1]: => not stack
        else s.pop()
        if value != min(h): => not queue
        else h.remove(value)

input list 係 list of pair 或 2-element lists。for command， value 會將個pair兩個scalar。
>>> for command, value in [('I', 1),('I', 2),('E', 1)] :
...   print command, value
... 
I 1
I 2
E 1

第二有好多方法，例如用播boolean variable

replies.msg:
hi巴打，又是禾牙

3個function O(n) O(n) O(n^2)
所以問題出係第三個用咗nested loop
但其實你find minimum in this specific case可以好簡單

只要你比多個array initially 有11個0
每次insert將對應number嘅index做increment by 1
如是者你就記低咗currently每個數字嘅數目
然後extract時find minimum就是loop from 1-10，只要個index嘅value大過1，個index就是minimum，再將value減返1
如是者find min cap係loop10次，constant，time complexityO(1)，nested loop都係O(n)

Btw, 巴打去咗邊到exchange？

然後extract時find minimum就是loop from 1-10，只要個index嘅value大過1，個index就是minimum，再將value減返1
如是者find min cap係loop10次，constant，time complexityO(1)，nested loop都係O(n)

replies.msg:
def judge_minqueue(inputs, n):
    stack = []
    for i in range(11):
        stack.append(0)
    for i in range(n):
        if inputs[i][0] == 'I':
            stack[inputs[i][1]] = stack[inputs[i][1]] + 1
        else:
            print(inputs[i][1])
            for i in range(11):
                if stack [i] != 0:
                    minimum = i
                    break
            print(inputs[i][1])
            if inputs [i][1] != minimum:
                return False
            else:
                stack [i] = stack [i]-1
    return True



btw 巴打 唔知點解我個 inputs[i][1] value 係揾完個minimum 之後 無啦啦改變左 無論我打咩佢都會變左 2 如果我remove 左搵minimum 個part 又變返正常

所以問題 99%係揾minimum個part 到 但我又唔知個exact 問題係邊到
可唔可以請點下我 唔該

def judge_minqueue(inputs, n):
    stack = []
    for i in range(11):
        stack.append(0)
    for i in range(n):
        if inputs[i][0] == 'I':
            stack[inputs[i][1]] = stack[inputs[i][1]] + 1
        else:
            print(inputs[i][1])
            for i in range(11):
                if stack [i] != 0:
                    minimum = i
                    break
            print(inputs[i][1])
            if inputs [i][1] != minimum:
                return False
            else:
                stack [i] = stack [i]-1
    return True
